prompt:
Q: Why is the capital of France Berlin?
A:
output:
Q: Why is the capital of France Berlin?
A: We do not think it has an enormous influence over Europe, but we look at whether a certain area or part of Germany might have been affected by German imperialism. And because then to give this sense about how important and powerful that city was in World War I … It seems like there may be some value derived from its location for war with Poland; something which many Germans believe today remains untapped after WWII." [The History Of The United States In 1920s & 1950s] (p. 21)
